title: pavonia prionophylla
intro: Pavonia prionophylla, also known as Rock Rose or Mexican Rose, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Pavonia prionophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
